outfit_info.outfit_description: This vibrant ensemble blends practical warmth with a playful spirit. A dark puffer jacket is layered over a bright blue corduroy shirt and a navy half-zip sweater. Patterned flannel pants add a whimsical touch, complemented by sporty sneakers. The outfit creates a comfortable yet dynamic look, perfectly suited for youthful outdoor activities.

model_attributes.body: A young boy with a lean build, exuding youthful energy and a natural, joyful demeanor, poised in an active stance.
model_attributes.pose: Standing with feet slightly spread, looking upwards with a bright, engaged smile, suggesting wonder and enthusiasm.
model_attributes.background: A picturesque coastal landscape with rolling green hills, a serene body of water, and a warm, atmospheric sky at sunset.
